summary: Iteration 10: All 7 features tested and passed. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (admin bookings filter, admin schedule date range, free trial booking, second booking blocked). Frontend: All 3 UI features verified (Moj profil button, upcoming-only bookings display, trial success toast).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/bookings returns only tip='predstojeći' - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/admin/bookings returns only datum >= today - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/admin/bookings has no 'završen' or 'otkazan' bookings - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/admin/schedule returns only today to today+10 days - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/admin/schedule has no past slots - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/bookings for NEW user without membership returns is_trial=true - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/bookings for same user SECOND time returns 400 error - PASSED
Backend: Admin login with +38766024148 PIN 2803 works - PASSED
Frontend: Admin sidebar has 'Moj profil' button with data-testid='admin-back-to-profile-btn' - PASSED
Frontend: Admin bookings page shows only 'Predstojeći' status badges - PASSED
Frontend: Schedule page shows trial success toast 'Cestitamo! Izabrali ste svoj besplatni probni trening!' - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Admin bookings endpoint correctly filters by tip='predstojeći' AND datum >= today
Admin schedule endpoint correctly limits to today + 10 days range
Free trial logic works: first booking without membership gets is_trial=true, second attempt blocked with 400
Moj profil button correctly placed in admin sidebar with proper navigation to /
seed_data_creation: Created test trial users during testing to verify free trial booking flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features verified: 1) Admin bookings returns only upcoming (tip='predstojeći' and datum >= today), 2) Admin schedule returns only today + 10 days, 3) Free trial booking for new users works with is_trial=true response, 4) Second booking attempt blocked with 400 error. Moj profil button in admin sidebar navigates to /. Trial success toast shows 'Cestitamo! Izabrali ste svoj besplatni probni trening!'

features_verified.1_admin_bookings_upcoming_only: GET /api/admin/bookings returns only tip='predstojeći' and datum >= today
features_verified.2_admin_schedule_10_days: GET /api/admin/schedule returns only slots from today to today+10 days
features_verified.3_free_trial_booking: POST /api/bookings for new user without membership returns is_trial=true
features_verified.4_second_booking_blocked: POST /api/bookings for same user second time returns 400 with trial message
features_verified.5_moj_profil_button: Admin sidebar has 'Moj profil' button that navigates to /
features_verified.6_admin_bookings_ui: Admin bookings page shows only 'Predstojeći' status badges
features_verified.7_trial_toast: Schedule page shows 'Cestitamo! Izabrali ste svoj besplatni probni trening!' toast
